goals: Insert a ToC page into a multi-page book/story
Show correct page numbers after pagination
Clickable links in digital exports when supported
Remain correct under Orientation changes (portrait/landscape) and Reflow Mode

reflowMode.description: When toggled, layout recalculates positions/sizes of blocks based on safe-area and constraints

userStories.title: Insert a ToC page
acceptanceCriteria: User can add a page with type=TABLE_OF_CONTENTS
Insert location: beginning / after cover / before first chapter / custom index
ToC page appears in page list with ToC icon and 'Contents' label

userStories.title: Auto-generate ToC entries and keep updated
acceptanceCriteria: Entries generated from CHAPTER_COVER and/or PAGE based on settings
Computed page numbers remain null until pagination is computed

userStories.title: ToC remains correct under Orientation changes
userStories.iWant: ToC to update when I switch portrait/landscape
userStories.soThat: page numbers and line breaks remain accurate
acceptanceCriteria: Changing project orientation triggers a full repagination (same as any layout-changing event)
After orientation change, ToC computedPageNumber values match the new pagination mapping
ToC layout (line wrapping, dot leaders alignment, column/indent spacing) re-renders to fit new safe-area
If the ToC itself is locked to a specific page orientation override, it repaginates using that page’s orientation

userStories.title: ToC supports Reflow Mode and safe-area resizing
userStories.iWant: ToC to reflow cleanly when Reflow Mode adjusts widths
userStories.soThat: it stays readable and doesn't overflow
acceptanceCriteria: When Reflow Mode changes canvas safe-area width/height, ToC reflows: wraps long titles and keeps page numbers aligned
If ToC entry text overflows, it wraps to the next line with preserved indentation for wrapped lines
Dot leaders (if enabled) only render on the final line of a wrapped entry (between last text segment and page number)
Page number column maintains a fixed min-width and right alignment within safe-area
ToC can flow onto continuation pages when height is insufficient after reflow/orientation

userStories.title: Clickable navigation in digital exports
acceptanceCriteria: digital export adds internal PDF links from ToC entries to target page anchors
print export disables links but keeps identical layout
If exporter lacks link support, ToC still renders with page numbers

tocPageEditor.layout: Canva-lite canvas center; controls at corners

orientationAwareness.showIndicator: Page settings shows current orientation (inherit/project or override)
orientationAwareness.staleBanner: Show 'ToC needs refresh' after orientation/reflow changes until pagination recomputed

controls.help: If contents exceed page height, create continuation ToC pages automatically.

fields.description: Auto-create continuation ToC pages when overflow occurs.
Hash of orientation + safe-area + reflow settings + typography + page order.
Version emitted by pagination engine; changes on any layout-affecting event.

newConcepts.layoutSignature: A deterministic hash used to detect when ToC numbers/layout are stale due to orientation/reflow/width changes.
newConcepts.paginationVersion: A version string emitted by the pagination engine after layout pass.

layoutSignatureInputs: toc.template, fonts, sizes, indent, lineSpacing, wrapMode
stalenessRules: If currentLayoutSignature != TocRenderCache.layoutSignature => ToC is stale (numbers and wrapping may be wrong)
If paginationVersion changed since TocRenderCache.paginationVersion => ToC is stale
Stale ToC must be auto-corrected during export regardless of UI refresh state

handlers.action: Invalidate pagination; mark ToC stale; schedule background repagination (debounced).
Update pageIdToPageNumberMap; recompute TocEntry.computedPageNumber; update TocRenderCache.layoutSignature + paginationVersion.

entryWrapping.wrapIndentStrategy: Continuation lines keep same indent as the entry text start (not including dot leaders area).

dotLeaders.wrappedEntryRule: Dot leaders render only on the last visible line (line that contains the page number).

overflowHandling.whenAllowMultiPageTrue: Auto-create TABLE_OF_CONTENTS_CONTINUATION pages immediately after the ToC page until all entries render.
overflowHandling.whenAllowMultiPageFalse: Truncate entries beyond page height and show warning badge 'ToC truncated'.

pdfExportIntegration.criticalRequirement: Export must recompute pagination in the final orientation + reflow configuration before rendering ToC numbers/links.
exportPipelineOrder: 1) Resolve effective orientation per page (inherit/project or override)
2) Resolve safe-area dims based on orientation + reflow constraints
3) Layout all pages to compute paginationVersion + pageIdToPageNumberMap
4) Generate/refresh ToC entries (respect manual overrides) and apply computed page numbers
5) Render ToC pages (including continuation pages) with final wrapping
6) If digital: add internal links using targetAnchorId

orientation: Switch portrait->landscape: ToC page numbers update to match new pagination
Switch landscape->portrait: ToC wrapping changes but page number column remains aligned
ToC page has orientation override=landscape while project=portrait: ToC uses landscape safe-area and correct numbers
reflowMode: Enable reflow reduces safe-area width: long entries wrap; dot leaders only on last line
Reflow changes safe-area width threshold (60% rule): ToC recomputes layoutSignature and becomes non-stale after pagination
Reflow makes ToC overflow: continuation pages created when allowMultiPage=true
exportConsistency: UI ToC stale state does not affect export: export always re-paginates and writes correct numbers
Digital export links still point to correct pages after orientation/reflow changes

implementationMilestones.title: Sprint 33: Reflow Mode integration
deliverables: wrap rules + dot leader last-line logic
